{"rule":"E001","severity":"fix","span":{"start":8,"end":10},"message":"banner contains portion mark \"NF\" for an IC dissem control; use banner abbreviation \"NOFORN\"","citation":"CAPCO-2016 §H.8","fix":{"source":"BuiltinRule","replacement":"NOFORN","confidence":1.0,"migration_ref":null}}
{"rule":"E003","severity":"error","span":{"start":11,"end":29},"message":"marking blocks are out of CAPCO order (expected: Classification // SCI // SAR // AEA // FGI // Dissem // REL TO // Non-IC)","citation":"CAPCO-2016 §A.6 p15-16","fix":{"source":"BuiltinRule","replacement":"SECRET//SI//NOFORN","confidence":0.6,"migration_ref":null}}

entries.name: nodis_exdis_conflict.txt
entries.expected_lint: {"rule":"E037","severity":"error","span":{"start":16,"end":21},"message":"NODIS and EXDIS must not coexist; each State Department dissem control is mutually exclusive per CAPCO-2016 §H.9","citation":"CAPCO-2016 §H.9 p172 + p174","fix":null}

entries.name: nodis_missing_from_banner.txt
entries.expected_lint: {"rule":"E040","severity":"error","span":{"start":12,"end":18},"message":"banner is missing NODIS required by portions (§H.9 roll-up rule: NODIS in any portion must appear in the banner)","citation":"CAPCO-2016 §H.9 p172 (EXDIS) + p174 (NODIS)","fix":null}

entries.name: nodis_portion_rel_to_banner.txt
entries.expected_lint: {"rule":"E039","severity":"error","span":{"start":28,"end":43},"message":"REL TO is not authorized in the banner line when any portion contains NODIS or EXDIS; NOFORN conveys the foreign-release decision in this case per CAPCO-2016 §H.9","citation":"CAPCO-2016 §H.9 p172 (EXDIS) + p174 (NODIS)","fix":null}

entries.name: nodis_without_noforn.txt
entries.expected_lint: {"rule":"E038","severity":"error","span":{"start":8,"end":13},"message":"NODIS and EXDIS may be used only with NOFORN information; add NOFORN to the dissem controls","citation":"CAPCO-2016 §H.9 p172 + p174","fix":null}

entries.name: portion_nodis_exdis_commingled.txt
entries.expected_lint:
{"rule":"E037","severity":"error","span":{"start":8,"end":10},"message":"NODIS and EXDIS must not coexist; each State Department dissem control is mutually exclusive per CAPCO-2016 §H.9","citation":"CAPCO-2016 §H.9 p172 + p174","fix":null}
{"rule":"E041","severity":"warn","span":{"start":11,"end":13},"message":"portion contains both NODIS and EXDIS; NODIS (ND) supersedes EXDIS (XD) per §H.9 — remove EXDIS from the portion mark","citation":"CAPCO-2016 §H.9 p172 (EXDIS) + p174 (NODIS): NODIS supersedes EXDIS in the portion mark when both are present","fix":null}

entries.name: sar_bad_program_order.txt
entries.expected_lint: {"rule":"E028","severity":"suggest","span":{"start":8,"end":17},"message":"SAR programs must be in ascending order (numeric first, then alphabetic)","citation":"CAPCO-2016 §H.5 p99 (programs: ascending, numeric first, then alpha)","fix":{"source":"BuiltinRule","replacement":"SAR-BP/CD","confidence":0.85,"migration_ref":null}}

entries.name: sar_banner_missing_program.txt
entries.expected_lint: {"rule":"E031","severity":"suggest","span":{"start":30,"end":30},"message":"banner SAR block is missing programs present in portions: CD","citation":"CAPCO-2016 §H.5 p101 (Unique SAPs contained in portion marks must always appear in the banner line; hierarchy depiction optional per §H.5 p101 + p99)","fix":{"source":"BuiltinRule","replacement":"/CD","confidence":0.9,"migration_ref":null}}

entries.name: sar_indicator_repeat.txt
entries.expected_lint: {"rule":"E030","severity":"suggest","span":{"start":14,"end":22},"message":"SAR category indicator must not be repeated; multiple programs use a single indicator with '/' separator","citation":"CAPCO-2016 §H.5 p100 (SAP category indicator must not be repeated if multiple SAP programs are applicable)","fix":{"source":"BuiltinRule","replacement":"/CD","confidence":0.9,"migration_ref":null}}

entries.name: sar_portion_full_form.txt
entries.expected_lint: {"rule":"E026","severity":"warn","span":{"start":5,"end":29},"message":"portion marks must use the SAR- abbreviation, not the SPECIAL ACCESS REQUIRED- full form","citation":"CAPCO-2016 §H.5 p101 (Authorized Portion Mark)","fix":{"source":"BuiltinRule","replacement":"SAR-BP","confidence":0.35,"migration_ref":null}}

entries.name: sar_unclassified.txt
entries.expected_lint: {"rule":"E027","severity":"error","span":{"start":14,"end":18},"message":"SAR markings may only be used with TOP SECRET, SECRET, or CONFIDENTIAL classifications","citation":"CAPCO-2016 §H.5 p101 (Relationship(s) to Other Markings)","fix":null}

entries.name: sci_banner_missing_compartment.txt
entries.expected_lint: {"rule":"E035","severity":"error","span":{"start":48,"end":52},"message":"banner SCI block is missing markings present in the page's portions (systems, compartments, and/or sub-compartments): SI-G ABCD (sub-compartment missing from banner)","citation":"CAPCO-2016 §H.4 per-system \"Precedence Rules for Banner Line Guidance\" (e.g. HCS p62 line 1397, SI p74 line 1819, TK p85 line 2250) + §D.2 p28 (general banner/portion consistency). All unique SCI markings in portions must appear in the banner line; unlike SAR, SCI has no hierarchy-optional carve-out.","fix":{"source":"BuiltinRule","replacement":"SI-G ABCD","confidence":0.9,"migration_ref":null}}
